new_claims.claim_text: Iran attacked Kuwait’s Ministry of Oil building as retaliation for Trump and Israel coordinating an attack against Iran’s energy infrastructure.
US and Israel bomb petrochemical facilities in Iran.
Al Jazeera confirms the US and Israel have bombed over 760 schools and 350 health centers in Iran.
new_claims.notes: Claim of war crimes, citing Al Jazeera, needs verification.

new_claims.claim_text: Trump says Iran has 48 hours to open the Strait of Hormuz or 'all hell will reign down on Iran.'
new_claims.notes: Claim of an ultimatum from Trump, needs verification.

new_claims.claim_text: Trump has been taken to Walter Reed Hospital.
